system.requirement: Once you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} (formidable or greater) in service to a seasoned warrior, and to train with them…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by sizing up your foe in a fight, or in a charged situation which may lead to a fight, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
When you study or train in a new weapon or technique, you may obtain and upgrade that combat talent for 1 fewer experience.
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3129f4caa4754caf]{Take Decisive Action} when in a Bad Spot with a sudden change of weapon or technique, mark progress before rolling.
